name: rf-cdp-email-ai
description: RF segment: AI email-marketing engine. Ported from US modules/email (generators + lifecycle triggers, law-agnostic), with Russian copy, an LLM gateway pointed at Flot, a 152-FZ / 'О рекламе' compliance footer replacing CAN-SPAM, and a mandatory marketing-consent gate wired to the consent-ledger. Delivery is handed off to Dittofeed.
